gaps.description: M1: Hardware detector — GPU/CPU/OS/memory (src/detector/hardware.js + gpu-detector.js)
M1: Remote profiles from CDN with local cache (src/detector/profiles.js)
M1: Ollama auto-install — no code to install Ollama binary or pull recommended models automatically
M1: Basic HTTP REST API with SSE streaming (src/server/api.js)
M1: Web UI minimal chat dialog (src/ui/client/)
M1: One-click install script — setup.sh only runs npm install + node, no curl-pipe or npx entrypoint verified
M1: Remote profiles CDN URL is placeholder (cdn.example.com), not a real endpoint
M2: STT integration — SenseVoice/Whisper/cloud fallback adapter pattern implemented (src/runtime/stt.js)
M2: TTS integration — Kokoro/Piper/cloud fallback adapter pattern implemented (src/runtime/tts.js)
M2: Push-to-talk UI implemented (PushToTalk.vue)
M2: VAD auto-detection — no VAD implementation found, only manual push-to-talk
M2: Wake word detection — WakeWord.vue with configurable wake word via Web SpeechRecognition
M3: WebSocket device registration and heartbeat (src/server/hub.js)
M3: Visual perception — face/gesture/object detection via agentic-sense (src/runtime/sense.js)
M3: Device tools speak/display/capture via sendCommand in hub.js
M3: Admin panel with device list, logs, hardware, config tabs (src/ui/admin/)
M4: Cloud fallback auto-switch to OpenAI/Anthropic when Ollama fails (src/runtime/llm.js)
M4: Config hot-update when remote profiles change — watchProfiles() in profiles.js
M4: Docker deployment — docker-compose.yml exists in install/
M4: User documentation and README — not found
